raw.subject: Your Omaha page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I loved seeing the photos of Simon aka Junior on your page. It's clear you have a great team, and your customers are lucky to have such a friendly face taking care of their cars.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet - which might be leaving some potential customers on the fence, especially if they're searching for auto detailing services online. Having a site would give you a chance to showcase your services and expertise, and maybe even get a few more calls coming in.

I sketched out a quick idea for a homepage that incorporates some of the great content you're already sharing on Facebook, like a services overview and a photo gallery. Here's a sneak peek:

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/dakar-auto-detail-omaha-mobile-car-wash-omaha

I'd love to chat more about how a simple website could help your business, and get you set up with a straightforward project at a flat fee for local businesses. If you're interested, feel free to reply or give me a quick call to discuss the details.
